entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH, BECOMING WEST 5 TO 10 MPH IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING SOUTHEAST IN THE AFTERNOON

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS AROUND 60
SOUTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY SUNNY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING
MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S

PARTLY SUNNY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT
